# MyTattoo

> Deposit-secured booking for independent tattoo artists — turn your Instagram bio link into a reference-attached booking that's confirmed by a deposit.

MyTattoo helps independent tattoo artists turn their Instagram bio link into a branded booking page. Clients leave their contact details and reference images with no account needed; the artist reviews and offers a time and deposit; the appointment lands on the calendar only once the deposit clears via Stripe. MyTattoo.Software is currently in early access, onboarding independent tattoo artists by invitation.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://mytattoo.software/): Product overview and how the deposit-secured booking flow works
- [Tattoo Studio Software](https://mytattoo.software/tattoo-studio-software/): Product overview — booking, reference intake, and deposit collection
- [Pricing](https://mytattoo.software/pricing/): Early access — get in touch for pricing
- [About](https://mytattoo.software/about/): Product story and mission
- [Contact](https://mytattoo.software/contact/): Get early access or ask a question

## Feature Pages

- [Tattoo Booking Software](https://mytattoo.software/tattoo-booking-software/): Online booking with deposit collection, reference image upload, and automatic confirmation emails
- [Tattoo Booking App](https://mytattoo.software/tattoo-booking-app/): Mobile-friendly booking page for managing requests, offers, and deposits from your phone
- [Tattoo Artist Software](https://mytattoo.software/tattoo-artist-software/): Tools for independent tattoo artists — booking links, reference intake, and deposit-gated calendar
- [Tattoo Scheduling Software](https://mytattoo.software/tattoo-scheduling-software/): Deposit-gated appointment scheduling for the independent artist

## Tools

- [Tattoo Studio Revenue Calculator](https://mytattoo.software/tattoo-studio-calculator/): Free calculator to model studio revenue, session pricing, utilisation rates, and profitability projections

## Blog

- [Blog](https://mytattoo.software/blog/): Guides covering tattoo studio management, pricing strategy, client care, aftercare advice, and design trends

- [Privacy Policy](https://mytattoo.software/privacy-policy/)
